name: profile-explorer
description: Root orchestration for the backend service, shared libs, and frontend app. The backend service and shared libs are npm workspaces; the frontend app owns its own dependencies.

scripts.up: npm run install:all && npm run build:libs && npm run db:up && concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test:libs && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
